rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>我的丈夫因病无法动弹，<unk[5:0]>
我便在这里照顾他……
这一切都怪我任性带着他去新婚旅行……

<unk[3:0:259]>……<unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>他本就体弱多病，<unk[5:0]>之前倒下的时候，
多亏一位亲切的旅行者帮忙，才为他备好了药。
那次他康复后，我便为了他
<unk[3:0:266]>拼命学习制药……<unk[5:0]>却因为我的错……<unk[5:0]>
……照目前的病情来看，<unk[5:0]>
只要有古栗欧克的肝脏就能制出药了……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>我老公因生病而無法動彈，<unk[5:0]>
所以我就在這照顧他……
都怪我硬要帶他出門度蜜月……

<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>……他本來就體質虛弱，<unk[5:0]>之前病倒時
還是多虧一個親切的旅行者，才能將藥準備好。
<unk[3:0:266]>在他康復後，我為了扶持他而拼命學習醫藥，
然而卻……<unk[5:0]>都是我的錯……<unk[5:0]>
……從症狀來判斷，<unk[5:0]>只要有古慄歐克的肝臟
就能製藥了……

<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:6}だんな>旦那が<Ruby={4:8}びょうき>病気で<Ruby={2:4}うご>動けなくなってな<unk[5:0]>
ここで<Ruby={4:10}かんびょう>看病しているんだ…
アタシが<Ruby={4:4}むり>無理に<Ruby={8:16}しんこんりょこう>新婚旅行に<Ruby={2:2}つ>連れ<Ruby={2:2}だ>出したから…

<unk[3:0:259]>…<unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>この<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人は もともと<Ruby={4:12}びょうじゃく>病弱で<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}まえ>前に<Ruby={2:4}たお>倒れた<Ruby={2:4}とき>時は
<Ruby={4:8}しんせつ>親切な<Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人のおかげで<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬を<Ruby={4:6}ようい>用意できたんだ

<unk[3:0:266]><Ruby={4:6}ひっし>必死で<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬の<Ruby={4:10}べんきょう>勉強したのに…<unk[5:0]> アタシのせいで…<unk[5:0]>
…<Ruby={4:12}びょうじょう>病状を<Ruby={2:2}み>見る<Ruby={2:4}かぎ>限り<unk[5:0]> グリオークの<Ruby={2:4}きも>肝さえあれば

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>As you can see, my husband is too sick to
move. <unk[5:0]>I am caring for him here.

This is my fault. I wanted the two of us
to have a wedding adventure. That has
now proved to be unwise.
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>He has a weak constitution by nature...
Once before, he collapsed from illness.
A kind traveler helped me treat him then.
<unk[3:0:266]>I have since pushed myself to know the
ways of medicine. It was only a matter of
time before he would need more help.
The return of my husband's illness is...<unk[5:1]>
my fault.<unk[5:1]> But I know what it will take to
heal him this time.
A medicine made from Gleeok guts.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>但古栗欧克是有着三个头的怪物，
它利用巨大的翼在空中飞行，十分可怕……
我倒是知道它就在
格鲁德峡谷的山顶上……
<unk[3:0:268]>得想想办法把它弄到手……<unk[5:0]>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>但古慄歐克是一種有三顆頭的怪物，
牠會用巨大的翅膀飛行，相當恐怖……
雖然我知道牠就在
格魯德峽谷的山頂……
<unk[3:0:268]>得想辦法弄到手才行……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>ただ グリオークってのは<Ruby={2:2}み>三つ<Ruby={2:4}くび>首のバケモンで
<Ruby={2:4}おお>大きな<Ruby={2:6}つばさ>翼で<Ruby={2:4}そら>空を<Ruby={2:2}と>飛ぶ <Ruby={2:4}おそ>恐ろしい<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴でさ…
ゲルドキャニオンの<Ruby={4:12}ちょうじょう>頂上にいることは
<Ruby={2:2}し>知っているんだが…
<unk[3:0:268]>どうにか<Ruby={4:6}ようい>用意しないと…<unk[5:0]>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>A Gleeok is a horrible creature that flaps
across the sky using huge wings.

I know there's one that flies over
Gerudo Canyon, but attacking it would
be difficult.
<unk[3:0:268]>I will need to prepare somehow.<unk[5:0]>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:266]>没想到他会在新婚旅行的时候病倒……
都怪我太任性了……
要是有古栗欧克的肝脏，
应该就能治好他……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:266]>我老公居然在度蜜月時病倒……
都怪我太勉強他了……
要是有古慄歐克的肝臟
就能救他了……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:266]><Ruby={8:16}しんこんりょこう>新婚旅行で<Ruby={2:4}たお>倒れてしまうなんて…

この<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人を<Ruby={2:4}すく>救えるのに…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:266]>My husband collapsed all because I
insisted we go on a wedding adventure.
I should not have pushed for it.
If I had Gleeok guts, I could save him...

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>My husband suffers and suffers. <unk[5:0]>I need to
get some Gleeok guts before long.
Here, have this.
What's a Gleeok?
Goodbye.

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>こ… これはもしかしてグリオークの<Ruby={2:4}きも>肝！？<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>サークサーク！

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>C-could this be? Gleeok guts?! How

<unk[3:0:263]>No, there is no time for that. Forgive
me if I go right to making my medicine.
I know I can save him with it.
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>Sarqso!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>古栗欧克是有着三个头的怪物，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>A Gleeok is a horrible creature that flaps
across the sky using huge wings.

The thing has three heads, which gives it
three times the terror. It lords over the
sky from the top of Gerudo Canyon.
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>But there's no way I can get the innards
of a creature that flies through the sky.
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>He's recovered fully, all because of you!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>谢谢你救了我心爱的丈夫，
我对你表示由衷的感谢。
请你务必收下这个。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>你救了我心愛的老公，
我打從心底感謝你。
希望你能收下這個。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}あい>愛する<Ruby={4:6}だんな>旦那を<Ruby={2:4}すく>救ってくれて

どうか これを<Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取ってほしい
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>I'm grateful to you for saving my true
love, from the bottom of my heart.

Please, I want you to take this.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>我们决定继续去新婚旅行了，
不过我这次一定不会再任性了。
好了，萨伯库！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>我們決定繼續度蜜月，

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>アタシたちは <Ruby={8:16}しんこんりょこう>新婚旅行を<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続けることにしたよ

standing here.

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>My husband has terrible dreams without
end. I cannot imagine how hard this must
be for him.

<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>I have not been able to sleep, watching
as my husband suffers.
What can I do?

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬さえ<Ruby={2:4}つく>作れれば…
rows.USen: I must make the medicine!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>虽然用古栗欧克的肝脏制成的药很苦，

多亏了你，我才能得救，谢谢！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>服下用古慄歐克的肝臟製成的藥之後，

多虧了你，我才能得救，謝謝！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>グリオークの<Ruby={2:4}きも>肝を<Ruby={2:4}つか>使った<Ruby={2:6}くすり>薬を<Ruby={2:2}の>飲んだら

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Unbelievable! All of my agony, just gone!
I've been saved, thanks to the medicine
my wife made out of Gleeok guts.
And, of course, to you!
Ngh...
